对了，恁草稿箱里还有木有？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742629108,"group_id":"7386865673697233982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小白一枚呀，大家多多关照","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8pcsQCoDyk/1+gEM25uOFXeobr6UMDwNUBdI20vjx9S","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6a42c7522cf544f4ab3c43d260a78adc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794584&x-signature=qcw9mlUyrjQY1DFcwdzEn5sfGXI%3D","user_id":"3444136373924589","user_name":"rommia"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3444136373924589","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7386865673697233982","book_info":{"abstract":"【清甜小太阳x各种性格的大反派，1v1，画风清奇的轻松幽默的治愈小甜文。男女主性格因为剧情设置不固定，不容易审美疲劳哦】
朝（zhao）晕（第四声）在被一个不靠谱的系统绑定后，就算每次都被分配到炮灰角色，还是努力兢兢业业地完成自己的救赎任务。
千万世界里，有人阖家欢乐，幸福圆满，有人备受摧残，一生草草收场。
他们或许是家庭悲惨，或许是生来性格有缺，又或许只是单纯爱错了人，跌跌撞撞地一个人走完了一生。
直到朝晕来了。
于是，暴躁的酷哥校霸在未来本来要黑化，成为网络犯罪嫌疑人，如今却忙着操心斜前桌的成绩。
豪门出身的电竞选手本来要对女主爱生爱死甚至赔上一生，如今却在恋综上抱着手机傻笑着喊一个女明星姐姐。
长大后冷漠无情的豪门养子，如今却板着脸教育隔壁家的小姑娘不要谈恋爱。
为争夺女主不惜与男主作对，最后落得惨死下场的金牌杀手，如今却每天偷翻别人家墙，眼巴巴地对官家小姐喊饿。
…？
如果有萌萌大赛，他们一定要把朝晕捧到第一名。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f594cf621fddc70e6c8719fd566efc87","author":"春腰","author_id":"","book_id":"7386865673697233982","book_name":"治愈！拯救可怜反派","book_short_name":"见朝则生","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8b060","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7452209198663729726","read_count":"65579","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1581190"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"759","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,甜宠,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7ee6b81eaf105561c22f716e83633cb4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444173&x-signature=W84sIJ0nla5zUc3KA38t0%2FTaRc4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109595028617","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"114"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323180252A5A0EB05EC0D940DF1B9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":232,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9141,"reply_count":10,"show_pv":22555},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7487847997843456830","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大大的文笔真是太好了，我划了不少线[偷笑]这和我以前看的救赎文不一样，不是说别人写的不好，而是大大的文章真正让我体会到了什么是救赎。朝晕真的整个人都充满阳光，整个人都朝气蓬勃的。每个世界的男主在遇到朝晕以后都会哭会笑的，我也是情绪跟着跌宕起伏。就是写的让我可以感觉到温暖，这真的是我看小说七年以来从未感受到的一点。我看大大主页的签名里有说到喜欢温暖、喜欢自由、喜欢爱，我就在想大大到底是怎样一个暖暖的人？怎么可以写出这么暖暖的故事！[害羞]朝晕的塑造，每一分都刚刚好。果然，我们爱的都是人物背后作者强大的灵魂！[飞吻][飞吻][飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":28,"text":"救赎文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774260173940DF1B9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227487847997843456830%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227386865673697233982%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743407373,"group_id":"7386865673697233982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"写出好看的文，希望读者们读得高兴愉快","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/c4Pa+M77lLIjX11BIQMHOsKymmIMwQYOYAAjXg7W+r","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f9ac050fc7c6476a8e76f723ef91e44f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790868&x-signature=8ZH3%2Bd375pxkGWjSwcG1rm7eWBQ%3D","user_id":"3633257064697975","user_name":"阮夕雾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3633257064697975","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":fals 千万世界里，有人阖家欢乐，幸福圆满，有人备受摧残，一生草草收场。

第二个世界觉得温神的性格好爱吃醋，好喜欢，好喜欢喊姐姐，人物真的很带感
